title: Integrate M5 alpha scenario
summary: Compose m5.alpha_content_framework.first_season.v1 in headless runtime using the anomaly roster, faction/governance hooks, first-season event pool and alpha content catalog.
acceptance: Headless scenario m5.alpha_content_framework.first_season.v1 runs deterministically with recorded requested seed authoritative seed content hash command stream hash final world hash and read-model hash
Scenario exercises borrowed-shadow third-knock and old-bridge guest rules through structured evidence non-combat handling and accident-review rows
Scenario exercises faction/governance hooks first-season events alpha content definitions and at least four strategy paths without UI authority
M0-M4 regression protection remains active and no M4 baseline behavior is weakened to make M5 pass
Focused tests and scenario artifacts record structured reasons cap hits queue metrics and stop signs for save/replay Worker and benchmark tasks

history.details: Created by WM-0072 M5 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Create the first integrated M5 headless alpha content scenario as the basis for save/replay Worker and benchmark gates.
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: integrated scenario papers over owner gaps; any owner-store gap blocks instead of adding hidden state.
Risk: strategy path proof becomes prose; tests must assert structured facts and hashes.
Risk: scenario creates save/Worker/public contract changes early; those remain downstream tasks.
benchmarkImpact: Produces scenario metrics and artifacts for WM-0081 through WM-0083; no baseline update in this task.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; qa-performance must be consulted before changing invariant or benchmark expectations.
rollbackModel: Revert M5 integrated scenario code artifacts docs and report; leave individual M5 owner surfaces intact.
ownerGate: Do not implement save/replay Worker parity or benchmark baselines in this task
Record deterministic hashes and scenario artifact paths
Block on owner gaps global scans public contracts dependencies UI authority or M6 scope

sparkEligibility.reason: Integrated deterministic scenario composition is cross-surface simulation work.
